meaning: n.[动]岩羚羊(产于欧洲和西亚地区的小羚羊),羚羊皮,麂皮,擦拭用的软皮
examples: Photo Tip: it's always wise to have a good chamois lens cleaner with you.
Whenever chamois dries up and becomes hard, Soak it in water for revitalization.
Just keep a small bottle filled with baby oil in your golf bag along with a chamois cloth or towel.
Two chamois, startled at this quiet time of day, bound across the trail, over the wall and into their state-protected sanctuary.
Early evening is a magical time here, with only the occasional chamois grazing the slopes and the shrill whistling of marmots interrupting the pervading sense of calm.
